title: GitLab (GTLB) Is Up 7.1% After $1B ARR Milestone and $400M Buyback Plan - What's Changed
text: GitLab surpassed the significant $1 billion annual recurring revenue threshold while its board greenlighted a $400 million share repurchase initiative. The company achieved very large year-on-year free cash flow growth to $220 million, strengthening its financial position. Q4 revenue climbed to $260.4 million from $211.43 million year-over-year, though the company swung from profitability to a $2.6 million net loss. Management provided fiscal 2027 revenue guidance between $1.10-$1.12 billion. Beyond the capital return program, GitLab advanced artificial intelligence initiatives through the Duo Agent Platform launch and expanded its Managed Service Provider Partner Program, positioning AI monetization as a near-term priority for investors to monitor.
